API Endpoints

If you're not familiar with API Endpoints you'll want to brush up here.

Please note, that API Endpoints are not available unless you're using the included Elegance Server.

In elegance, the convention for creating endpoints is route.ts files go inside the folder api, which is in your pages folder.

The pathname for the endpoint is it's path relative to the pages directory. A route like pages/api/user/route.ts will be available at: localhost:3000/api/user

Methods

You can export any async function with these names POST, GET, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE, and if a request has the HTTP Method matching that functions name, it will be called after middleware has finished executing.
